tasks.title: Capture tool/command calls in codex JSON stream
evidence: User request: 'Create a task to enhance the codex runner JSON streaming output to capture tool and command calls in addition to messages.'
User provided codex exec JSON output for review in /tmp/codex-exec.json
plan: Locate codex JSON streaming output handling in the runner execution path
Extend JSON event parsing to capture tool and command call payloads alongside messages
Add/extend tests that assert tool and command calls are emitted in the JSON stream
Validate against the captured /tmp/codex-exec.json fixture or a minimal repro
Add a blank newline after the agent messages for visual improvements.
tasks.request: Create a task to enhance the codex runner JSON streaming output to capture tool and command calls in addition to messages. The user has captured the outputs of 'codex exec --json "Say hello. Then connect to repo prompt and get the file tree. Then run a bash command to list files in this repo. then send 'I'm done now' and exit" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/codex-exec.log' in the /tmp/codex-exec.json file for review
